prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic street portrait of a young woman with long flowing blonde hair, standing outside a cozy vintage flower shop during golden hour. She wears an elegant fitted black turtleneck dress, holding a bouquet of dried flowers and soft pastel blooms in her hands. Warm sunlight streams through the scene from above and behind, creating dreamy lens flares, soft rim lighting around her hair, and a glowing amber atmosphere. The subject is captured in slight motion, turning her head to the side, creating natural motion blur across her face and hair. Wind gently lifts strands of hair, enhancing the candid editorial feel. The background features rustic storefront details, flower arrangements, newspapers, wooden textures, and warm autumn-inspired tones in shades of orange, brown, and gold. Shallow depth of field, soft focus aesthetic, cinematic bokeh, nostalgic film look, vintage color grading, dreamy haze, subtle grain, fashion editorial photography, emotional storytelling composition, natural lighting, realistic skin texture, DSLR quality, 85mm lens, f/1.8, high dynamic range, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, moody atmosphere, luxury magazine style, 8K resolution, vertical portrait composition, soft golden glow.
